name: Crayola Ultra Clean Washable Markers (40ct), Teacher School Supplies for Kids, Broad Line Colored Markers, Art Marker Set, Ages 3+
bullets: CRAYOLA BROAD LINE MARKERS: Features 40 Crayola Ultra Clean Washable Markers in assorted colors that offer practicality, versatility, and creativity all in one package.
WASHABLE MARKERS: Each less-mess colored marker washes easily from skin, washable clothing, and most painted walls.
GIFT FOR KIDS & TODDLERS: These washable markers make a practical and creative gift for boys, girls, and grandkids—ideal for birthdays, back‑to‑school, or everyday art projects.
COLORING MARKERS FOR KIDS: Choose from 40 unique colors to decorate art projects with eye-popping flair.
ART MARKERS: Essential for any child’s artistic endeavors, these markers offer a range of colors and are perfect for a variety of creative projects.
BACK TO SCHOOL SUPPLIES: These are must-have markers for school supplies lists, adding versatility to both academic and creative tasks and ensuring students are prepared for the school year.
description: Immerse yourself in creativity with the Scribble Scrubbie Pets Tub 2.0! This interactive set includes a kid-powered purple bathtub, 4 adorable animal toys, 6 washable markers, and 1 scrub brush. Kids can color and customize their pets with Crayola Washable Markers, then wash them clean in the scrub tub to design again and again. More than just a toy, this set offers a fun pet grooming adventure that sparks imagination and encourages self-expression. The markers wash easily from skin and most washable clothing, making cleanup simple for parents. This Crayola set makes a great Christmas gift for

reviews.name: Frank
reviews.title: Wonderful colors
reviews.body: Wonderful set. So many colors. Perfect for my six-year-old. Great price. Would be great for a birthday gift for a friend.

reviews.name: Integrafwh333
reviews.title: Great for young artists
reviews.body: Very easy to clean but bring and vibrant colors. My daughter loves these theyre just the right size and durable enough to out last her. Great variety too!

reviews.name: Dee
reviews.title: Worth the money!
reviews.body: Lots of colors to choose from. Work great on construction paper.

reviews.name: Jacqueline Jensen
reviews.title: Great washable markers
reviews.body: Love these markers for little ones. It’s interesting to see how a small child can distinguish the different tones of the colors. It’s fun to watch them pick out their favorite color and reject other ones the same color but different tones. I appreciate the ability to wash off any marks that ended up where they aren’t supposed to be.
